name: Veere (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal logo — a stylised harbour skyline on a green-to-yellow panel — with the name 'GEMEENTE VEERE' lettered above and below.
history: Flag of the municipality of Veere in the province of Zeeland. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal harbour-skyline logo and wordmark 'GEMEENTE VEERE'
